PROP-01b-partial-asm-002.text: AUCTION_BIDDER_ROLE holders control solution data that determines _multiCall targets in callback.
PROP-01b-partial-asm-002.assertion: trust: AUCTION_BIDDER_ROLE holders provide safe solution data; malicious solution => arbitrary calls

locations.note: AUCTION_BIDDER_ROLE-gated (line 69). When solution.length > 0, encodes solution as data (line 76) and passes it to auction.bid — the solution is later decoded and executed as arbitrary calls in auctionCallback
Decodes solution at line 107 and executes via _multiCall at line 109 — arbitrary call execution path
